platforms.name: FTH OS
platforms.subtitle: Future Tech Holdings
platforms.tagline: Deterministic capital infrastructure across 13 chains.

platforms.name: FTH Boutique OS
platforms.subtitle: Global Commodity Sourcing & Structuring
platforms.tagline: 50 years of commodity intelligence. Now AI-native.
platforms.description: MCP-orchestrated, RAG-powered global commodity advisory system. Coffee, cocoa, precious metals, base metals, and energy — structured with compliance intelligence, 110-point credit scoring, and institutional-grade proposal generation. Est. 1976.

platforms.name: Genesis Protocol
platforms.subtitle: Genesis Protocol
platforms.tagline: Deterministic multi-agent economic simulation engine.
platforms.description: Computational macroeconomic research infrastructure. 5,680 simulated worlds with zero collapse observed. Logistic resource pools with mutation and catastrophe stress testing.

platforms.subtitle: Helios

platforms.name: FTH University
platforms.subtitle: FTH Trading University

platforms.description: Comprehensive education platform covering blockchain engineering, AI systems, deterministic finance, and institutional capital market architecture.

platforms.name: KAIROS

platforms.tagline: Local sovereign AI OS with agentic RAG and voice runtime.
platforms.description: KAIROS is the sovereign AI operating system — a local-first, deterministic AI runtime powering agentic RAG systems, voice interfaces (XTTS + Wake Word), and deterministic document intelligence. No cloud dependency. Full sovereignty.

platforms.name: SUPER-S
platforms.subtitle: Sovereign Unified Protocol Engine — Research Series
platforms.tagline: Unified protocol engine for sovereign research and simulation.
platforms.description: Sovereign Unified Protocol Engine for research-grade simulation, protocol testing, and deterministic systems validation across the entire FTH ecosystem.

platforms.name: FTH Documentation Hub
platforms.subtitle: Sovereign Documentation Infrastructure
platforms.tagline: Deterministic documentation and knowledge architecture.
platforms.description: Centralized deterministic documentation infrastructure for all FTH ecosystem platforms, protocols, and sovereign systems.

platforms.name: USDF Monetary Stack
platforms.subtitle: Sovereign Digital Currency Engine
platforms.tagline: Reserve-backed deterministic monetary policy across XRPL and Stellar.
platforms.description: Reserve-backed sovereign digital currency engine. Deterministic mint/burn policy, reserve proof attestation, and multi-chain monetary operation across XRPL and Stellar with IPFS-backed audit trails.

platforms.name: Asset Factory OS
platforms.subtitle: Tokenization Pipeline
platforms.tagline: End-to-end RWA tokenization with compliance-gated multi-chain deployment.
platforms.description: Full-stack tokenization pipeline supporting ERC-721, ERC-1155, and ERC-3643 with NIL33 compliance gating. Multi-chain deployment to Polygon and XRPL.

platforms.name: NIL33 Infrastructure
platforms.subtitle: Zero-Knowledge Compliance Rail
platforms.tagline: Privacy-preserving identity proofs and jurisdiction-aware compliance gating.
platforms.description: Zero-knowledge compliance rail providing KYC/AML gating, privacy-preserving identity proofs, jurisdiction-aware compliance logic, and institutional access control across the stack.

platforms.name: NIL33 Athlete Intelligence
platforms.subtitle: Athlete Market Valuation Engine
platforms.tagline: NCAA-compliant athlete valuation across 14 sports with AI deal tracking.
platforms.description: Athlete-facing intelligence platform for market valuation, NCAA and 50-state compliance grounding, RAG knowledge base, 14-sport coverage, deal tracking, and multi-provider AI pipeline.

platforms.name: GMIIE Intelligence
platforms.subtitle: Market Surveillance & Intelligence Engine
platforms.tagline: Institutional flow detection, sentiment analysis, and daily intelligence generation.
platforms.description: Market surveillance platform providing sentiment analysis, institutional flow detection, and daily intelligence generation. Feeds the Kairos supervisory AI with market signal data.

platforms.name: DICS Compliance Intelligence
platforms.subtitle: Compliance Monitoring & Threat Detection
platforms.tagline: Automated sanctions screening, transaction monitoring, and compliance reporting.
platforms.description: Compliance monitoring and threat detection system with automated sanctions screening, transaction monitoring, and compliance reporting. Integrates with NIL33 and Kairos for full-stack coverage.

platforms.name: Anchor Broadcast Network
platforms.subtitle: Cross-Chain Proof Settlement
platforms.tagline: Merkle anchor propagation across XRPL, Polygon, and Stellar.
platforms.description: Cross-chain proof settlement and propagation network. Broadcasts Merkle anchors, formats chain-specific transactions, manages confirmation tracking, and synchronizes proof publication across XRPL, Polygon, and Stellar.

platforms.name: Sovereign Vault
platforms.subtitle: Key & Secret Management
platforms.tagline: HSM-backed root trust layer managing signing keys, TLS, and cert chains.
platforms.description: Key and secret management system with HSM-backed design. Manages signing keys, TLS certificates, API secrets, and cert chains. Root trust layer for the entire infrastructure stack.

platforms.name: L1 Protocol Layer
platforms.subtitle: Canonical Rules & Node Synchronization
platforms.tagline: Canonical schemas, communication standards, and gRPC/WebSocket node sync.
platforms.description: Canonical protocol rules and schemas defining communication standards, node synchronization, and inter-service contracts across the infrastructure. gRPC / WebSocket / TLS stack.

platforms.name: LPS-1 Publishing Protocol
platforms.subtitle: Deterministic Literary Publishing
platforms.tagline: Merkle-anchored publication lifecycle with smart contract-backed provenance.
platforms.description: Deterministic publishing pipeline with edition provenance, Merkle-anchored publication lifecycle, and smart contract-backed literary protocol. Immutable on-chain authorship and publication records.

platforms.name: SunFarm Energy Layer
platforms.subtitle: Tokenized Renewable Energy Infrastructure
platforms.tagline: IoT-connected solar production feeds REC issuance and token rails.
platforms.description: Tokenized renewable energy infrastructure connecting IoT production data to REC issuance and digital token rails. Time-series oriented with MQTT and TimescaleDB-style architecture.

platforms.name: Spectral Ledger
platforms.subtitle: AR NFT Hunting System
platforms.tagline: GPS-anchored AR NFT discovery with on-chain minting via geohash.
platforms.description: Augmented reality NFT hunting system using GPS/geohash positioning and on-chain minting. Game-like mobile/PWA system for location-based digital asset discovery.

platforms.name: Drone GNC Framework
platforms.subtitle: UAV Guidance, Navigation & Control
platforms.tagline: Aerospace-grade simulation and estimation tooling for autonomous UAVs.
platforms.description: UAV guidance, navigation, and control research environment with aerospace-grade simulation tooling. Deterministic estimation and control frameworks separate from the capital stack.

platforms.name: Mens of God
platforms.subtitle: Faith-Based Community Platform
platforms.tagline: Faith-first community platform isolated from financial infrastructure.
platforms.description: Faith-based community platform explicitly isolated from financial infrastructure. Independent brand extension operating on its own stack with no capital stack dependencies.
